message:
fix(node): algorithmic correctness improvements in 4 connector modules

- connector/schema_migration.rs: Filter out self-loop migrations and
  replace Vec with VecDeque for BFS queue (pop_front instead of
  remove(0)), improving migration path finding from O(n^2) to O(n)
- connector/bocpd.rs: Add NaN/negative value handling in categorical
  probability calculation to prevent invalid array indexing from
  corrupted observation data
- connector/execution_scorer.rs: Split empty array check from length-1
  check with separate logic for correct probability perturbation when
  only one execution candidate exists
- connector/region_ownership.rs: Add explicit ForceTerminated state
  handling with comment for Running state, completing task draining
  state machine coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
